description: This is a test suite for the Offcanvas component, testing its behavior, configuration, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It includes setup and teardown routines, and covers various scenarios such as opening, closing, focus management, and API interactions.

classes.name: Offcanvas
classes.description: The Offcanvas class manages the offcanvas component, including initialization, event handling, show/hide logic, configuration, and disposal.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Retrieves the configuration for the Offcanvas instance, merging default, data attributes, and user-provided options.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the offcanvas, manages focus trapping, and handles backdrop and scroll behavior.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the offcanvas, releases focus trap, and restores scroll and backdrop states.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the Offcanvas instance, removing event listeners and DOM references.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the offcanvas.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style API for creating and controlling Offcanvas instances.
